articles.title: Jaylen Brown responds to report that he’d be the 7th-best player on an NBA team according to analytics
articles.description:
"Analytics nowadays used to discredit and control narratives, roll the ball out, none of these guys better than me on both ends."

The post Jaylen Brown responds to report that he’d be the 7th-best player on an NBA team according to analytics appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown disputes analytics ranking him as the 7th-best NBA player.
Brown emphasizes his skills on both ends of the court.
Boston Celtics fans may rally behind Brown's confidence amid trade rumors.

articles.title: Red Sox jump on Gerrit Cole early to defeat Yankees in third straight game
articles.description:
Coming off an embarrassing series loss to the Rockies, Boston looks like a completely different ball club this weekend.

The post Red Sox jump on Gerrit Cole early to defeat Yankees in third straight game appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox defeated Yankees, marking their third consecutive victory against them.
Boston's offense surged early, capitalizing on Gerrit Cole's struggles on June 27.
This win boosts team morale after a disappointing series against the Rockies.
